history.text: A republic was declared, changing Senegal's political system and state identity.
Senegal became independent from France with French Sudan as the Mali Federation, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Withdrawal from the Mali Federation changed control of the territory.
Dissolution of the Senegambia Confederation tied the territory into a wider political structure.
